title: Hot Wheels Mid Mill, Rod Squad Series, Metallic Red Custom Hot Rod, 7/10, Diecast Car Model
features: COLLECTIBLE DESIGN: Metallic red vintage hot rod with custom gold-rimmed wheels and detailed Mid Mill casting from the Rod Squad series
SERIES INFORMATION: Part of the Rod Squad series, numbered 7/10, and #97/250 in the mainline collection
AUTHENTIC DETAILS: Features exposed engine block, vintage-style grille, and custom Hot Wheels graphics and flame decorations
CONSTRUCTION: Die-cast metal and plastic construction built to Hot Wheels' precise specifications for durability and performance
DISPLAY READY: Comes in original blister pack packaging, perfect for both play and collection display purposes
description: Product description Rev up your collection with this stunning Hot Wheels Mid Mill from the Rod Squad Series. This meticulously detailed 1:64 scale diecast car showcases a magnificent metallic red finish adorned with classic Hot Wheels styling and distinctive gold accents. The vintage hot rod design features an exposed engine, sleek aerodynamic body, and eye-catching gold-rimmed wheels that perfectly complement its retro aesthetic. Part of the Rod Squad series (7/10), this Mid Mill model sports authentic vintage-inspired decorations and premium detailing that collectors and enthusiasts will appreciate. The car comes in the iconic Hot Wheels blister pack, perfect for both display and play. Whether you're a serious collector or looking for an engaging toy car, this Mid Mill captures the essence of classic hot rod culture with its bold styling and premium finish. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under three years old
